summary: Quest Map v2 testing complete. Backend (11/11 tests passed) and Frontend (all features verified). Quest Map redesigned from hex-grid categories to spiral spider-web layout. XP renamed to SP (Sadakat Puani). All 500 quests displayed in single screen with shape-based SP values: circle=20SP, square=45SP, triangle=100SP, star=200SP.
critical_code_review_comments: SP system correctly implemented - badge shows 'SP' not 'XP'
Quest 0 at center is unlocked by default
Neighbor-based unlock mechanism works via web connections
Golden-angle spiral layout creates aesthetic spider-web pattern
Shape-based SP values: circle=20SP, square=45SP, triangle=100SP, star=200SP
All 500 quests render with good Canvas performance
Minimap provides navigation overview in bottom-right
Search filters quests by name/description in real-time
Detail panel shows quest name, difficulty (Kolay/Orta/Zor/Efsanevi), description, SP value
Tamamla button completes quest, Tamamlandi shows for completed, Kilitli for locked
Backend correctly persists completed_quests and quest_xp in users collection
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quest Map v2 fully tested and working. Redesigned from hex-grid categories to spider-web spiral layout with golden-angle positioning. XP renamed to SP (Sadakat Puani). Page URL: /quest-map. Key test IDs: quest-map-page, quest-map-canvas, quest-minimap, quest-search-input, quest-zoom-in, quest-zoom-out, quest-reset-view, quest-back-btn, quest-sp-badge, quest-detail-panel, quest-complete-btn. Backend APIs: GET /api/quests/progress, POST /api/quests/{quest_id}/complete. Shape SP values: circle=20, square=45, triangle=100, star=200.

backend_api.GET /api/quests/progress: PASSED - Returns completed_quests array and quest_xp
backend_api.POST /api/quests/{quest_id}/complete: PASSED - Marks quest complete and awards SP
backend_api.new_user_zero_sp: PASSED - New users start with 0 SP

frontend_ui.quest_map_page_load: PASSED - Page loads at /quest-map with data-testid='quest-map-page'
frontend_ui.spider_web_layout: PASSED - 500 quests in spiral golden-angle layout
frontend_ui.shape_rendering: PASSED - Circle, square, triangle, star shapes visible
frontend_ui.legend: PASSED - Shows '20 SP', '45 SP', '100 SP', '200 SP', 'Bitti' labels
frontend_ui.search_functionality: PASSED - Search filters quests by name
frontend_ui.quest_detail_panel: PASSED - Shows name, difficulty, description, SP value
frontend_ui.tamamla_button: PASSED - Shows for unlocked incomplete quests

mocked_apis.Google Drive: MOCKED - Google Drive integration is mocked
